reference: Hello. Sometimes, increased discharge is normal and is associated with the menstrual cycle. During mid-cycle, discharge increases and it is clear, watery, and non-odorous. If it is not itchy and does not have a smell like fishy odor, then it can be observed for a few days. Otherwise, you can take metronidazole four hundred milligrams three times a day for five days to get relief. Also, avoid nylon undergarments and ensure good personal hygiene.
text: Hello, sometimes increased discharge is normal and is associated with the menstrual cycle. During mid-cycle, discharge increases and it is clear, watery, and non-odorous. If it is not itchy and does not have a smell like fishy odor, then it can be observed for a few days. Otherwise, you can take metronazole 400 mg three times a day for five days to get relief. Also, avoid nylon undergarments and ensure good personal hygiene.
